scripts.publish:react: npm version patch --workspaces --no-git-tag-version && turbo run build --filter=@kbach/react && npm publish --workspace=@kbach/react
scripts.publish:native: npm version patch --workspaces --no-git-tag-version && turbo run build --filter=@kbach/native && npm publish --workspace=@kbach/native
scripts.publish:all: npm version patch --workspaces --no-git-tag-version && turbo run build && npm publish --workspaces
